{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work (Reddi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to it.",
    "R1.7": "Corrects one misattribution and tightens citations, demonstrating some engagement with existing scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "Doesn't explicitly state uncertainty for any claims, presenting all improvements as certain.",
    "RX.3": "The edits are focused on the requested text and don't introduce substantial new content outside the scope.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content introduced; the edits appear to improve the text.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traceable, but minor edits lack explicit source annotations."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work (Reddi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to it.
rationale.R1.7: Corrects one misattribution and tightens citations, demonstrating some engagement with existing scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: Doesn't explicitly state uncertainty for any claims, presenting all improvements as certain.
rationale.RX.3: The edits are focused on the requested text and don't introduce substantial new content outside the scope.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced; the edits appear to improve the text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traceable, but minor edits lack explicit source annotations.
